title: eriobotrya undulata
intro: Eriobotrya undulata is a species of flowering plant in the rose family, native to southern China, and is commonly known as the Chinese quince or mountain apple. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Eriobotrya undulata include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, but more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
